bridge: Now, where were we? Ah, yes!
What was I saying? Oh, that's right.
Picking up where we left off.
Back to the topic at hand.

main_dialogue: Hi! Do you need help finding things to do?
Looking for outdoor fun, culture, or a mix of both?
Want to start your morning with something relaxing, like the Riverwalk Trail?
It follows the river through the old part of town. It's great for photos too.
Should I send a walking map to get you started?
Sent! You'll pass a few coffee spots along the way, are you interested in a local café?
Try Blue Fern Café, it's a small, cozy, locally roasted beans.
After that, up for something more hands-on?
There's a downtown art studio offering a 2 PM workshop on painting or pottery.
Want me to check availability for the painting class?
Good news! There's a spot open. Should I reserve it?
Done. You'll have time for lunch before that. Want a suggestion nearby?
Willow Café is a favorite. It's local food and river views.
Need help with anything else today?
Perfect! Have a good day.
interruption_reply: /attend_other/ Hi, I can help you, just give me one second and I will come to you. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ I'll be with you as soon as I finish helping this visitor. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ I can assist you now if you have a quick question. How may I help you?
/attend_other/ Usually, buses run every 15 minutes. However, because of a marathon happening in the city today, they're running once every hour. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ I believe my colleague in the back can help you now. Go ahead and check with him. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ My colleague in the back is ready to help you. Feel free to head over now. /attend_user/

main_dialogue: Welcome back! Do you need additional help?
Want to explore the town’s history next?
How about walking the Heritage Trail and visiting the Historical Society Museum?
The trail includes landmarks and markers that tell the town's story.
The museum has weekend exhibits and storytelling sessions. Curious?
Yes! They start around 4 PM and run for a couple of hours.
Absolutely. General admission is open, no booking needed.
Need help with anything else today?
Great! Enjoy your day!
interruption_reply: /attend_other/ Hello, I'm just wrapping something up, I'll be with you as soon as possible. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ If it's a quick question, I'd be happy to help now.
/attend_other/ There's a bus ticket machine in the back of this room. You can also purchase tickets inside the main station. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ I'm really sorry, I cannot help further. Head over to my colleague in the back for more help. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ You can walk over to my colleague in the back for more information. /attend_user/

main_dialogue: Hi, glad to see you again! Need any assistance?
The Hearth & Oak is just across the street. It’s local cuisine in a rustic setting.
Shall I book you a table for 8 PM?
Reservation confirmed. Need help with anything else today?
Great. It was a pleasure to help you. Have a nice day.
interruption_reply: /attend_other/ Sure, you seem to be in a hurry. What can I help you with?
/attend_other/ We keep all forgotten items in the box at the back of the room. Just have a quick word with my colleague over there and they will be happy to help. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ Sorry, I can't help you any further. My colleague in the back can show you exactly where the box is. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ Feel free to walk to the back of the room. My teammate will point out where the box is. /attend_user/
